description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The exterior is primarily white with large, grid-style windows on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front features a driveway leading to a garage and a main entryway, while the rear opens onto a spacious, enclosed patio area with sliding glass doors. The house includes multiple rooms visible through the windows, such as a living area, kitchen, and bedrooms, with interior walls painted in soft pastel colors. The structure is surrounded by paved surfaces and a low boundary wall at the rear, typical of urban residential lots. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and open-plan living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large windows, a flat roof, and a spacious rear patio enclosed by a low wall. The design features a garage, paved entry, and open-plan interior rooms visible through the windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, garage, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, white facade, multiple windows, and the extended rear patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed patio, sliding glass doors, and open living/dining area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the rear patio wall and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, adjacent garage, and paved approach; no porch or decorative columns.
